name: Clock not synchronised (NTP/chrony)
description: The time daemon lost sync or stepped the clock (chronyd/ntpd/systemd-timesyncd). Bad time breaks TLS, Kerberos and log correlation. Message-text match so it works across shippers.
query: _msg:~"(Time service has not synchronized|System clock wrong by|clock unsynchroni|no servers can be used|cannot reach any|Forward time jump|stepping system clock|System clock was stepped)"
